productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Sand Black Red Shoe
description: CompositionWhite shoes with phylon sole, EVA sockliner and multi-directional nubs on the outsoleWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washIf you are born for trekking and hiking, then grab this pair of shoes from adidas for that ultimate comfort for your feet while you indulge in adventurous activities. The red stripe bands connecting the upper with the outsole give it a stylish look and add structure to the shoe, the EVA sockliner ensures the feet are well cushioned. The multi-directional nubs on the phylon outsole enhances grip and comfort, making it an ideal footwear for the adventurous.
